game_subtitle: A ganzenbord about the Netherlands. Roll and see where you end up.
hint_start: Roll the dice to begin, or click on a tile.
hint_empty: Empty tile — no content filled yet.
overlay_quote: "Chinese tourists are blocking the bike path. To avoid them, go back to square 39."
overlay_cite: Amsterdam 750 Years, a book distributed to 60,000 primary school children.
overlay_original_quote: "Chinese toeristen blokkeren het fietspad. Om ze te ontwijken ga je terug naar vakje 39."
overlay_body: As a Chinese, I feel so special to be the only nationality addressed in this book, so I decided to create a game-punch-back for it. This game means no offense to anyone, but aims to bring more awareness for the systemic discrimination against Chinese and other Asian people in The Netherlands and beyond.
